---

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What problem would this solve for UXPreflight users or AI-agent workflows?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior, command, rule, adapter, or documentation you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives or workarounds you considered.

## Example Usage

```bash
npm run ux --
```

## Additional Context

Add any related screenshots, examples, or links. Do not include secrets or private customer data.
